1.gl: to be clear (orig. of sound, but usually of color); to shine; hence, to make ashow, to boast; and thus to be (clamorously) foolish; to rave; causatively, to celebrate; also to stultify
1.kj: (make) boast (self), celebrate, commend, (deal, make), fool(-ish, -ly), glory, give (light), be (make, feign self) mad (against), give in marriage, (sing, be worthy of) praise, rag

1.gl: a foreign nation; hence, a Gentile; also (figuratively) a troop of animals, or a flight of locusts
1.dv: rarely (shortened) גֹּי; apparently from the same root as H1465 (גֵּוָה) (in the sense of massing);

1.gl: properly, to address in aloud tone, i.e. (specifically) loud; figuratively, to pacify (as if by words)
1.kj: commend, glory, keep in, praise, still, triumph.

1.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
1.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

1.gl: a collection, i.e. community of persons

2.gl: properly, concealed, i.e. the vanishing point; generally, time out of mind (past or future), i.e. (practically) eternity; frequentatively, adverbial (especially with prepositional prefix) always
2.kj: alway(-s), ancient (time), any more, continuance, eternal, (for, (n-)) ever(-lasting, -more, of old), lasting, long (time), (of) old (time), perpetual, at any time, (beginning of t

2.gl: to be clear (orig. of sound, but usually of color); to shine; hence, to make ashow, to boast; and thus to be (clamorously) foolish; to rave; causatively, to celebrate; also to stultify
2.kj: (make) boast (self), celebrate, commend, (deal, make), fool(-ish, -ly), glory, give (light), be (make, feign self) mad (against), give in marriage, (sing, be worthy of) praise, rag

2.gl: kindness; by implication (towards God) piety; rarely (by opposition) reproof, or (subject.) beauty
2.kj: favour, good deed(-liness, -ness), kindly, (loving-) kindness, merciful (kindness), mercy, pity, reproach, wicked thing.

2.gl: to be strong; by implication, to prevail, act insolently
2.kj: exceed, confirm, be great, be mighty, prevail, put to more (strength), strengthen, be stronger, be valiant.
assured(-ly), establishment, faithful, right, sure, true (-ly, -th), verity.

2.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
2.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).
